testcase.name: jwtMissingClaims_returns401
testcase.system-out: 10:14:06.067 [main] WARN com.adapstory.gateway.filter.PluginAuthFilter -- Plugin JWT validation failed: JWT missing required claims: [plugin_id]

testcase.name: expiredJwt_returns401
testcase.system-out: 10:14:06.092 [main] WARN com.adapstory.gateway.filter.PluginAuthFilter -- Plugin JWT validation failed: Expired JWT
